description_long: This is a rugged all-terrain vehicle designed for off-road and urban environments, featuring a robust, open-top frame with reinforced bumpers and a visible roll cage for occupant safety. The vehicle has four large, knobby tires suited for traversing uneven surfaces, and its body is constructed from dark, matte-finished metal panels with some plastic trim. The front is equipped with a protective grille and a mounted light bar, while the rear includes a cargo area and additional utility fixtures. The interior is minimalistic, with bucket seats and a round steering wheel, optimized for durability and easy cleaning. Exposed suspension components and undercarriage details suggest high ground clearance and advanced shock absorption. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on function and resilience in challenging conditions.
description: A rugged, open-top all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, reinforced metal body, and a visible roll cage, designed for durability and off-road performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the protective grille, mounted light bar, and the open cockpit with a visible steering wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, roll cage, and the large, knobby tires with visible suspension components.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the cargo area, rear bumper, and utility fixtures, as well as the roll cage extending over the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open seating, roll cage, and rugged tire design.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose and uneven terrain, making them suitable for both off-road and urban surfaces.
